---
name: New Post Processor
about: Request support for a new CNC controller
title: "[POST PROCESSOR] "
labels: post-processor, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Controller Information

- **Controller Name**: [e.g., Tormach PathPilot]
- **Manufacturer**: [e.g., Tormach]
- **Website**: [URL]
- **Type**: [e.g., Hobby, Industrial, Hybrid]

## G-Code Specifications

### Format Requirements
- **File Extension**: [e.g., .gcode, .nc, .tap]
- **Line Numbers**: [Yes/No, format: N####]
- **Coordinate System**: [e.g., G54, G55]
- **Units**: [e.g., G21 metric, G20 imperial]
- **Absolute/Incremental**: [e.g., G90 absolute]

### Program Structure
```
[Example program header]
%
O0001 (PROGRAM NAME)
(Program header here)

[Example program body]
(First few lines of G-Code)

[Example program footer]
M30
%
```

### Tool Change
- **Tool Change Command**: [e.g., M6]
- **Spindle Warmup**: [e.g., M3 S1000 + dwell]
- **Tool Length Offset**: [e.g., G43 H##]

### Coolant
- **Flood**: [e.g., M8]
- **Mist**: [e.g., M7]
- **Off**: [e.g., M9]

### Spindle
- **CW**: [e.g., M3]
- **CCW**: [e.g., M4]
- **Stop**: [e.g., M5]
- **Speed Range**: [e.g., 0-24000 RPM]

## Special Features

- [ ] Rigid tapping
- [ ] Probing macros
- [ ] Tool wear compensation
- [ ] Multi-axis support
- [ ] High-speed machining (G05.1)
- [ ] Other: [describe]

## Sample G-Code File

If possible, attach a sample G-Code file generated by the manufacturer's CAM software.

## Additional Context

Any other information that would help implement this post processor.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have provided the controller name and manufacturer
- [ ] I have described the G-Code format
- [ ] I have included a sample program structure
- [ ] I have attached a sample G-Code file (if available)
